candidate.completion: introduce me to your wi-fi; it connects faster than people do.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please introduce me to your wi-fi; it connects faster than people do.

evaluation.rationale: A clean, intelligible pivot built on the double meaning of connection, with a real social observation underneath. It lands, but the wi-fi-versus-people contrast feels familiar rather than sharp enough to be fully quotable.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
